ddls:
CREATE TABLE "solar_panels" (
  "panel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solar panel */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the solar panel was installed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the solar panel installation */,
  "panel_type" TEXT /* Type of solar panel (e.g., monocrystalline, polycrystalline) */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the solar panel in watts */,
  "inverter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the inverter associated with the solar panel */,
  "mounting_type" TEXT /* Type of mounting system used for the solar panel (e.g., rooftop, ground-mounted) */,
  "tilt_angle" REAL /* Tilt angle of the solar panel */,
  "azimuth_angle" REAL /* Azimuth angle of the solar panel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("panel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy production record */,
  "panel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solar panel that produced the energy */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the energy production record */,
  "pv1" REAL /* PV1 value in watts */,
  "pv2" REAL /* PV2 value in watts */,
  "power_in" REAL /* Power input from the solar panel in watts */,
  "power_out" REAL /* Power output from the solar panel in watts */,
  "power_usage" REAL /* Power usage in watts */,
  "energy_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the energy produced (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the solar panel during energy production */,
  "irradiance" REAL /* Irradiance of the solar panel during energy production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_production_panel_id FOREIGN KEY ("panel_id") REFERENCES solar_panels ("panel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_storage" (
  "storage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy storage system */,
  "storage_type" TEXT /* Type of energy storage system (e.g., battery, capacitor) */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the energy storage system in watt-hours */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the energy storage system */,
  "storage_status" TEXT /* Status of the energy storage system (e.g., charging, discharging, idle) */,
  "depth_of_discharge" REAL /* Depth of discharge of the energy storage system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("storage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy consumption record */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the energy consumption record */,
  "power_usage" REAL /* Power usage in watts */,
  "load_type" TEXT /* Type of load consuming the energy (e.g., residential, commercial, industrial) */,
  "consumption_pattern" TEXT /* Pattern of energy consumption (e.g., peak, off-peak) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_timestamp FOREIGN KEY ("timestamp") REFERENCES energy_production ("timestamp")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., engineering, operations, management) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., energy production, energy consumption) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the user accessed the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used by the user to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "panel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solar panel that produced the energy */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the analytics record */,
  "energy_production" REAL /* Energy production in watt-hours */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption in watt-hours */,
  "energy_efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the energy production and consumption */,
  "carbon_footprint" REAL /* Carbon footprint of the energy production and consumption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_panel_id FOREIGN KEY ("panel_id") REFERENCES solar_panels ("panel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "panel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solar panel or energy storage system that was maintained */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the maintenance event */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., cleaning, replacement) */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance activity (e.g., scheduled, in-progress, completed) */,
  "maintenance_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the maintenance activity (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_panel_id FOREIGN KEY ("panel_id") REFERENCES solar_panels ("panel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., alert, warning) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the notification (e.g., critical, warning, info) */,
  "notification_category" TEXT /* Category of the notification (e.g., energy production, energy consumption) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)
